posts.author: Arunachalam_B
posts.text: Goal based investing — Give gooal.in a try. I built this recently to track my investment goals.

posts.author: Arunachalam_B
posts.text: COIN - Goal based investing & tracking — I had the same frustration and so I built gooal.in . Give it a try and let me know your feedback. You can connect your Zerodha account, tag each SIP to a goal (like “Car” or “Emergency Fund”), and it shows how much is accumulated, what’s remaining, and when you’ll hit the target.

posts.author: Sandeep_Gupta1
posts.text: COIN - Goal based investing & tracking — @Neelesh have you understood our request? I am asking to implement goal based tagging to each coin SIP Example : provide an option to modify SIP and input one text which is my goal This shud be very simple. Also then based on text "goals which user inputs on each coin sip map those portfolio holdong in each fund Console can then fetch these tags and show a grouped view of each goal vs mapped mutual-funds Please let us know what is your views and when will u make goal based sips in coin live?
